panels.title: Contributions
panels.description: EUR. Canonical transfers from on-budget accounts to off-budget savings/investment accounts in the current month; requires finance trust.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 THEN SUM(s.amount_cents)/100.0 END AS value FROM savings_contributions s CROSS JOIN finance_trust f WHERE s.month=strftime('%Y-%m','now')

panels.title: Portfolio value
panels.description: EUR. Sum of the current holdings snapshot, not investment performance or tax-lot value; valuation freshness is shown separately.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 THEN SUM(h.total_value_cents)/100.0 END AS value FROM holdings h CROSS JOIN finance_trust f

panels.title: Holdings valued
panels.description: Latest valuation date reported by any current holding. Compare it with source freshness before using portfolio totals.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(valuation_date),'No holdings snapshot') AS value FROM holdings

panels.title: Pipeline issues
panels.description: Count now. Unresolved quarantines plus unresolved duplicate candidates and non-zero reconciliation gaps; inspect detail panels below.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quarantined),0) FROM pipeline_runs WHERE resolved=0)+(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_quality WHERE resolved=0 AND (kind='duplicate_candidate' OR (kind='reconciliation_gap' AND COALESCE(value_cents,0)<>0))) AS value

panels.title: Reported portfolio value over time
panels.description: EUR at each holdings snapshot. This is reported market value only; it is not a return series and does not adjust for contributions.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT snapshot_unix AS time,SUM(total_value_cents)/100.0 AS "Portfolio EUR" FROM holdings_history GROUP BY snapshot_unix ORDER BY snapshot_unix

panels.title: Current portfolio allocation
panels.description: EUR by current holding, sorted largest first. Exact values and names distinguish holdings; this is allocation, not performance.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT name AS Holding,total_value_cents/100.0 AS "Value EUR" FROM holdings ORDER BY total_value_cents DESC

panels.title: Expected source coverage and freshness
panels.description: Latest run per expected source, evaluated now. Status text, run outcome, age, and expected cadence make missing or stale coverage explicit.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest_runs AS (SELECT p.* FROM pipeline_runs p WHERE p.finished_at=(SELECT MAX(q.finished_at) FROM pipeline_runs q WHERE q.source=p.source)) SELECT e.source AS Source,l.finished_at AS "Latest run UTC",l.outcome AS Outcome,ROUND((strftime('%s','now')-strftime('%s',l.finished_at))/3600.0,1) AS "Age hours",ROUND(e.expected_cadence_seconds/3600.0,1) AS "Expected hours",CASE WHEN l.run_id IS NULL THEN 'MISSING' WHEN e.expected_cadence_seconds IS NULL THEN 'NO CADENCE' WHEN strftime('%s','now')-strftime('%s',l.finished_at)>e.expected_cadence_seconds THEN 'STALE' ELSE 'CURRENT' END AS Status FROM expected_sources e LEFT JOIN latest_runs l ON l.source=e.source ORDER BY Status DESC,e.source

panels.title: Pipeline runs and quarantined records
panels.description: Counts/day over the last 30 days. Completed runs and quarantined records use separate labels and line styles; inspect source coverage for cadence.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH run_days AS (SELECT date(finished_at) day,COUNT(*) runs,SUM(quarantined) quarantined FROM pipeline_runs WHERE finished_at>=datetime('now','-30 days') GROUP BY date(finished_at)) SELECT CAST(strftime('%s',day) AS INTEGER) time,runs AS Runs,quarantined AS Quarantined FROM run_days ORDER BY day

panels.title: Recent pipeline run detail
panels.description: Most recent 30 runs with source, timestamps, fetched/valid/add/update/quarantine counts, outcome, error code, and resolution status.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT source AS Source,finished_at AS "Finished UTC",fetched AS Fetched,valid AS Valid,added AS Added,updated AS Updated,quarantined AS Quarantined,outcome AS Outcome,COALESCE(error_code,'') AS Error,CASE resolved WHEN 1 THEN 'RESOLVED' ELSE 'OPEN' END AS Status FROM pipeline_runs ORDER BY finished_at DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Unresolved duplicate candidates
panels.description: Current unresolved data-quality checks classified as duplicate candidates. Review the source and detail; no rows means none are known.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT checked_at AS "Checked UTC",COALESCE(source,'') AS Source,COALESCE(account_id,'') AS Account,detail AS Detail FROM data_quality WHERE kind='duplicate_candidate' AND resolved=0 ORDER BY checked_at DESC

panels.title: Unresolved reconciliation gaps
panels.description: Current non-zero unresolved reconciliation checks. Gap is EUR; use account and detail fields to reconcile before trusting finance totals.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT checked_at AS "Checked UTC",COALESCE(source,'') AS Source,COALESCE(account_id,'') AS Account,value_cents/100.0 AS "Gap EUR",detail AS Detail FROM data_quality WHERE kind='reconciliation_gap' AND resolved=0 AND COALESCE(value_cents,0)<>0 ORDER BY ABS(value_cents) DESC
